title: Settings
fontPreview: This is an example of the current font size
darkModeDesc: Dark theme for comfortable viewing at night
notificationsDesc: Receive log reminders and health updates
helpSupportDesc: Chat with the Asinu team on Zalo
termsOfServiceDesc: Terms and conditions of using Asinu
privacyPolicyDesc: Your privacy and data protection policies
requestDataDeletionDesc: Request deletion of your account and personal data
taskRemindersDesc: Receive push when day is almost over
notificationPermDesc: Please allow notifications in your device Settings to receive reminders.
enableNotificationsFirstDesc: You need to enable "Notifications" before enabling "Task Reminders".
logoutConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to log out of your account?
deleteAccountWarning: This request will start Asinu’s official data deletion workflow.
deleteWarning1: You will be logged out immediately and the account enters a 72-working-hour deletion pending state.
deleteWarning2: Identity data, family links, health history, and SOS GPS data will be permanently deleted or anonymized.
deleteWarning3: You will need to complete one final OTP verification inside the app.
deleteWarning4: A minimal set of financial/accounting records may be retained as required by law.
deleteConfirmPrompt: To confirm, please enter the word "{{word}}":
deleteError: Cannot delete account. Please try again
deleteErrorGeneric: An error occurred while deleting account
testNotificationBody: Come check your health in the app!
scheduleHint: Asinu learns from your habits automatically. You can also set times manually.
scheduleSaveError: Failed to save, please try again
